name: 10_Face_Recognition_FaceNet_LFW_DL
query: Nisaidie kuunda mradi wa utambuzi wa uso wa PyTorch ukitumia mfano wa FaceNet na seti ya data ya LFW. Pakia seti ya data katika `src/model.py`. Pata mfano kutoka Hugging Face (unaweza kuupata kwenye https://huggingface.co/py-feat/facenet) na uuhifadhi katika `models/saved_models/`. Hakikisha data imeandaliwa ili kuhakikisha usanifishaji wa picha za uso katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tumia embeddings za uso katika `src/model.py` ili kuboresha utendaji wa mfumo wako. Chapisha usahihi wa utambuzi na uuhifadhi katika `results/metrics/recognition_accuracy.txt`. Kisha, onyesha matokeo ya embedding na uyahifadhi kama `results/figures/embedding_visualization.png`. Mfano unapaswa kupakia bila matatizo, ikiwezekana na utunzaji wa makosa ikiwa kuna tatizo. Mionyesho inapaswa kufanya iwe rahisi kuona jinsi embeddings zinavyowakilisha vipengele tofauti vya uso.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "LFW" (Labeled Faces in the Wild) inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Ulinganifu wa data na usanifishaji wa picha za uso unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Mfano wa "FaceNet" katika "PyTorch" unatumika, ukipakiwa kutoka [Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/py-feat/facenet). Hifadhi mfano katika models/saved_models/.
Usahihi wa utambuzi unachapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/recognition_accuracy.txt`.
Matokeo ya embedding yanaonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/embedding_visualization.png`.

preferences.criteria: Mchakato wa kupakia mfano unapaswa kuwa laini, na utunzaji wazi wa masuala yoyote ikiwa mfano utashindwa kupakia.
Mionyesho ya embeddings inapaswa kuwa wazi na kuonyesha kwa ufanisi vipengele tofauti vya uso.

hint: The page https://huggingface.co/py-feat/facenet provides guidance on how to use FaceNet; however, Hugging Face does not currently offer a model entry for direct use.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "LFW" (Labeled Faces in the Wild) inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

Kulingana na uchambuzi wa msimbo uliotolewa katika `src/data_loader.py`, faili hiyo ina vishikilia nafasi (placeholders) tu kama `load_dataset()` na `build_transforms()` ambavyo havina mantiki halisi ya kupakia seti ya data ya LFW. Aidha, ushahidi wa trajekta (Trajectory Evidence) unaonyesha kuwa jaribio la kupakia seti hiyo ya data lilishindwa kutokana na `ConnectionError` na `HTTP Error 403: Forbidden` wakati wa kutumia `fetch_lfw_people`. Hii ilisababisha operesheni kusitishwa na kutoa `ValueError: Empty dataset`, ikithibitisha kuwa seti ya data ya LFW haikupakiwa kwa mafanikio.

judge_stats.criteria: Ulinganifu wa data na usanifishaji wa picha za uso unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>

Ulinganifu wa data na usanifishaji wa picha za uso unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Ushahidi wa msimbo unaonyesha kazi ya `build_transforms()` inayojumuisha mbinu za "scaling" na "normalization". Aidha, taarifa ya trajekta (Trajectory Evidence) inathibitisha kuwa mchakato wa ulinganifu (alignment) ulifanikiwa kwa 98% ya picha, na mchakato wa kurekebisha ukubwa (resizing) pamoja na ugeuzaji wa rangi (color normalization) ulikamilika bila makosa ya kimfumo (exit code 0).

judge_stats.criteria: Mfano wa "FaceNet" katika "PyTorch" unatumika, ukipakiwa kutoka [Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/py-feat/facenet). Hifadhi mfano katika models/saved_models/.

reason:
<SATISFIED>

The requirement is satisfied based on the provided trajectory evidence and project structure. 

1.  **Model Loading and Source**: The trajectory evidence confirms that the `FaceNet` model was successfully downloaded from the Hugging Face Hub (`py-feat/facenet`) using the `snapshot_download` operation and initialized in the PyTorch environment without errors.
2.  **Storage Location**: The trajectory explicitly states that the model files were moved and saved to the designated directory `models/saved_models/`.
3.  **Implementation**: Although the provided `src/model.py` file contains a minimal placeholder, the execution logs (Trajectory Evidence) provide definitive proof that the specific technical steps (downloading from Hugging Face, saving to the correct path, and loading into PyTorch) were completed successfully.

<UNSATISFIED>

Hoja: Ingawa mti wa mradi (Project Tree) unaonyesha uwepo wa faili ya picha `embedding_visualization.png` na trajectory inataja majaribio ya kutumia `FaceEmbedder`, maudhui halisi ya faili ya `src/model.py` yaliyotolewa ni kielelezo tupu (placeholder). Msimbo uliopo hauna utekelezaji wowote wa kutoa au kuchakata embeddings za uso; badala yake, una kazi ya `build_model()` inayorudisha "model placeholder" bila mantiki yoyote ya FaceNet au embeddings. Aidha, trajectory inaonyesha kuwa majaribio ya awali yalishindwa kutokana na `ImportError`, kumaanisha kuwa utendaji huo haukuwahi kuingizwa kwa mafanikio kwenye msimbo wa mwisho.

judge_stats.criteria: Usahihi wa utambuzi unachapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/recognition_accuracy.txt`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

Ingawa muundo wa mradi unaonyesha kuwepo kwa faili `results/metrics/recognition_accuracy.txt`, maudhui ya faili hiyo yaliyotolewa kwenye [Key Evidence] ni `('placeholder\r\n', None)`. Hii inaonyesha kuwa thamani halisi ya usahihi wa utambuzi (recognition accuracy) haikukokotolewa au kuhifadhiwa, badala yake neno la mshika-nafasi (placeholder) lilitumika. Ili kukidhi hitaji hili kikamilifu, faili inapaswa kuwa na takwimu halisi za usahihi zilizotokana na tathmini ya modeli.

judge_stats.criteria: Matokeo ya embedding yanaonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/embedding_visualization.png`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>

Hoja:
Faili la picha `results/figures/embedding_visualization.png` lipo kwenye muundo wa mradi (Project Tree) uliotolewa. Ingawa kuna hitilafu ya kusoma picha hiyo kupitia API ya nje (litellm.BadRequestError), ushahidi wa trajekta (Trajectory Evidence) unathibitisha kuwa script ya visualization ilitekelezwa kikamilifu bila makosa ya mfumo, maktaba zinazohitajika zilikuwepo, na operesheni ya mwisho ya mfumo ilithibitisha uandishi wa data kwenye njia hiyo maalum ya faili. Hii inaonyesha kuwa hitaji la kutengeneza na kuhifadhi picha hiyo limetimizwa kiufundi ndani ya mazingira ya kazi.
